overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an open-world game (Assassin's Creed Odyssey) showing a character walking along a wooden dock in an ancient Mediterranean port, boarding a boat, and sailing across turquoise waters toward distant snow-capped mountains under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Mediterranean wooden dock with shipyard structures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock toward a covered pavilion and moored boat

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the dock walkway with rope coils scattered about
large red canvas tent with wooden pole supports
rough wooden scaffolding and construction materials
snow-capped mountain range across the turquoise water
open-air wooden pavilion with support beams
hanging red fabric banner with white geometric patterns
small wooden boat moored at the dock edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a weathered wooden dock in a sunny Mediterranean port. A red tent and wooden scaffolding stand to the right, while a covered pavilion with a hanging red banner appears ahead on the left. Snow-capped mountains rise in the distance across the calm turquoise water.

scene_state.functional_zone: boat deck at dock edge transitioning to open water

events.description: character boards the boat and pushes off from the dock, transitioning from walking to sailing with visible water wake forming

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the boat deck and pushing off from the dock, beginning to sail across the water

entered.detail: rolled fabric cushions and sailing supplies on the boat deck
white foam wake trailing behind the boat as it accelerates

segments.scene_description: The character boards a wooden boat at the dock's edge. As the boat pushes off and accelerates, a white wake forms in the water behind. The dock structures recede from view while the boat deck with rolled cushions fills the foreground, and the camera adjusts to the forward motion of sailing.

scene_state.functional_zone: open Mediterranean bay with distant mountains

agents.ego_description: sailing steadily across the turquoise water toward the distant mountains, maintaining a consistent course

entered.detail: expansive turquoise water stretching to the horizon with gentle waves
small sailboats visible on the horizon near the mountain base

segments.scene_description: The boat cruises steadily across the open turquoise bay, leaving a white wake behind. The wooden boat edge remains visible in the lower left foreground while the expansive water and distant snow-capped mountains dominate the view. Small sailboats appear on the horizon to the right as the journey continues across the calm Mediterranean waters.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bustling Mediterranean dock to a steady voyage across an open turquoise bay. It begins with the character walking along a weathered wooden pier past a red tent and scaffolding, with snow-capped mountains visible across the calm water. As the character boards a wooden boat, the camera shifts to capture the vessel pushing off and accelerating, causing the dock structures to recede while a white wake forms in the water. The scene then expands into a wide view of the open sea, with the boat's deck remaining in the foreground as the vessel cruises steadily toward the distant peaks. Finally, the perspective opens further to reveal small sailboats on the horizon under a clear blue sky as the journey continues across the expansive Mediterranean waters.
